message:
docs(extensions): add onboarding queue with ranked candidates from 1000-entry pool

Generate a prioritized onboarding queue from the extension candidate pool:

docs/extension-onboarding-queue.json:
- Structured pi.ext.onboarding_queue.v1 schema with ranked candidates
  filtered from the 1000-entry candidate pool
- Includes tier, star count, npm monthly downloads, and impact scores

docs/extension-onboarding-queue.md:
- Human-readable Top 100 table for quick triage of which extensions to
  vendor and validate next
- 777 eligible unvendored candidates identified

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
